## Validation
- [ ] `make generate`
- [ ] `make fmt`
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make test-race`
- [ ] `make vulncheck`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run` (if npm/package changes)

## Risk and Process Checklist
- [ ] Security impact reviewed (auth, secrets, dependency or workflow changes)
- [ ] Release impact reviewed (versioning, GoReleaser, npm/Homebrew behavior)
- [ ] Docs updated (README and/or contributor docs)
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
